positive: A whimsical, detailed illustration of a bioluminescent forest at twilight. Focus on glowing mushrooms, delicate floating particles, and ancient, root-covered trees. Style: Studio Ghibli meets Art Nouveau, highly saturated colors, digital painting, volumetric lighting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh shadows, grayscale
